title: rich tasty mediterranean flax eggs bowl
description: a hearty, comforting meal featuring flax eggs, stone-bowl dolsot, and a mediterranean-inspired mix of vegetables and legumes. perfect for a hangover cure or a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: dolsot bowl or large stone bowl

instructions: heat the dolsot bowl or large stone bowl to a scorching hot temperature by placing it in the oven at 425 degrees for 10-15 minutes.
in a small bowl, mix together the flaxseed and water to create a flaxseed mixture. let it sit for 5-10 minutes to thicken.
in a large skillet, heat the avocado oil over medium-high heat. add the chickpeas and cook until they start to brown, stirring occasionally.
add the diced tomatoes, roasted red peppers, and kalamata olives to the skillet. cook for an additional 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender.
add the flaxseed mixture to the skillet and stir to combine. cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the flax eggs are set.
crumble the feta cheese over the top of the skillet and stir to combine.
taste and adjust the seasoning as needed by adding salt, pepper, sumac, lemon juice, and parsley.
transfer the skillet mixture to the hot dolsot bowl or stone bowl. let it cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the bottom is crispy and golden brown.
serve hot, garnished with additional parsley and a side of crusty bread if desired.
